requirement_topic.en: NRCS Letter of Authority (LOA) — Mandatory Certification for Listed Electrical Appliances (VC 8055)
requirement_topic.zh: NRCS授权书（LOA）——VC 8055下上市电器强制认证
requirement_topic.zht: NRCS授權書（LOA）——VC 8055下上市電器強制認證

summary.en: South Africa's National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS) administers compulsory specifications for listed electrical products under the National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications Act (Act 5 of 2008). Heat pump air conditioners fall under VC 8055 (compulsory specification for household and similar electrical appliances). Importers and manufacturers must obtain a Letter of Authority (LOA) from the NRCS before importing or selling such products in South Africa. The LOA requires demonstration of conformance to the applicable SANS standard (SANS 60335-2-40 for heat pump AC safety), manufacturer registration with NRCS, and product sample testing by a recognised conformity assessment body. China's CCC certificate is not recognised as equivalent and does not substitute for the NRCS LOA.
summary.zh: 南非国家强制规范监管局（NRCS）依据《国家强制规范监管局法》（2008年第5号法案）对上市电器实施强制规范管理。热泵空调器适用VC 8055（家用及类似用途电器强制规范）。进口商和制造商须在进口或在南非销售此类产品前向NRCS申请授权书（LOA）。LOA要求通过认可的符合性评定机构证明符合相关SANS标准（热泵空调安全适用SANS 60335-2-40），并向NRCS登记注册及提交产品样品测试。中国CCC证书不被认可为等同，不能替代NRCS LOA。
summary.zht: 南非國家強制規範監管局（NRCS）依據《國家強制規範監管局法》（2008年第5號法案）對上市電器實施強制規範管理。熱泵空調器適用VC 8055（家用及類似用途電器強制規範）。進口商和製造商須在進口或在南非銷售此類產品前向NRCS申請授權書（LOA）。LOA要求通過認可的符合性評定機構證明符合相關SANS標準（熱泵空調安全適用SANS 60335-2-40），並向NRCS登記註冊及提交產品樣品測試。中國CCC證書不被認可為等同，不能替代NRCS LOA。

standards_or_laws: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications Act (Act 5 of 2008)
VC 8055 — Compulsory Specification for Household and Similar Electrical Appliances
SANS 60335-2-40 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances: Particular requirements for electrical heat pumps, air-conditioners and dehumidifiers

summary.en: China's CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is mandatory for heat pumps and split air conditioners sold on the domestic market, relying on GB 4706.32 (safety) and GB 4343.1 (EMC). CCC certificates and Chinese factory inspection records are domestic-market evidence and are not accepted by NRCS as equivalent conformity evidence for South Africa.
summary.zh: 中国CCC（强制认证）对境内销售的热泵和分体空调器为强制性，依据GB 4706.32（安全）和GB 4343.1（电磁兼容）。CCC证书和中国工厂检查记录属于中国国内市场证据，NRCS不接受其作为适用于南非的等同符合性证明。
summary.zht: 中國CCC（強制認證）對境內銷售的熱泵和分體空調器為強制性，依據GB 4706.32（安全）和GB 4343.1（電磁相容）。CCC證書和中國工廠檢查記錄屬於中國國內市場證據，NRCS不接受其作為適用於南非的等同符合性證明。

gap.en: CCC does not substitute for the NRCS LOA. Chinese exporters must register with NRCS, have product samples tested against SANS 60335-2-40 by a recognised conformity assessment body, and obtain the LOA before importing into South Africa. Note that South Africa operates at 230 V / 50 Hz (single-phase); Chinese product ratings at 220 V must be verified for compatibility within the ±10 % tolerance. Load-shedding conditions (frequent voltage fluctuation and outages) should also be considered in product design validation.
gap.zh: CCC不能替代NRCS LOA。中国出口商须向NRCS注册，通过认可符合性评定机构按SANS 60335-2-40对产品样品进行测试，并在进口南非前取得LOA。注意南非单相电网为230V/50Hz；中国产品额定值为220V，须验证在±10%容差范围内的兼容性。产品设计验证中还应考虑停电轮供工况（频繁电压波动和断电）。
gap.zht: CCC不能替代NRCS LOA。中國出口商須向NRCS登記，通過認可符合性評定機構按SANS 60335-2-40對產品樣品進行測試，並在進口南非前取得LOA。注意南非單相電網為230V/50Hz；中國產品額定值為220V，須驗證在±10%容差範圍內的相容性。產品設計驗證中還應考慮停電輪供工況（頻繁電壓波動和斷電）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NRCS LOA required before import or sale of listed electrical appliances under VC 8055
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic-market products under CCC; CCC not recognised as equivalent by NRCS

source.publisher: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications (NRCS), South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — NRCS LOA under VC 8055 is mandatory before import; CCC is not recognised. Product testing to SANS 60335-2-40, NRCS manufacturer registration, and voltage/load-shedding tolerance validation are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——进口前须取得VC 8055下的NRCS LOA；CCC不被认可。需按SANS 60335-2-40进行产品测试、向NRCS注册，并验证电压及停电轮供容差。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——進口前須取得VC 8055下的NRCS LOA；CCC不被認可。需按SANS 60335-2-40進行產品測試、向NRCS登記，並驗證電壓及停電輪供容差。
